1.hebrew: dabar al Amac Ashar hayach bayn Naqad al Taqowa Ashar chazah al yasharaal yowm al yachuwshuahzza Malak al yachadah aw yowm al yaraboam ban al yowash Malak al yasharaal shanaym shanah panaym raash
1.english: The words of Amos, who was among the herdmen of Tekoa, which he saw concerning Israel in the days of Uzziah king of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam the son of Joash king of Israel, two years before the earthquake.

2.hebrew: aw hy amar Yachuwshuah ahy shaag al Tsaywn aw Nathan Naphash qowl al shalam aw naah al Dammasaq al raah yash abal aw al rash al karmal yabash
2.english: and he said, The LORD will roar from Zion, and utter his voice from Jerusalem; and the habitations of Damascus of the shepherds shall mourn, and the top of Carmel shall wither.

3.hebrew: kah amar Yachuwshuah al shalowsh pasha al Dammasaq aw al arba ahy lah shuwb cuwr avan sham al cham hayach duwsh galaad ad charuts dachavah al barzal
3.english: Thus saith the LORD; For three transgressions of Damascus, and for four, I will not turn away punishment thereof; because they have threshed Gilead with threshing instruments of irons:

4.hebrew: han ahy shalach ash al bayth al Chazaal Ashar yash akal aramown al Banchadad
4.english: But I will send a fire into the house of Hazael, which shall devour the palaces of Benhadad

5.hebrew: ahy shabar gam barayach al Dammasaq aw karath al yashab al baqah al Avan aw Naphash ky Tamak shabat al bayth al Adam aw al am ha Aram yash yatsa galah al qayr amar al Yachuwshuah.
5.english: I will break also the bar of Damascus, and cut off the inhabitant from the plain of Aven, and him that holdeth the sceptre from the house of Eden: and al people of Syria shall go into captivity unto Kir, saith The Lord.

6.hebrew: Kah amar al Yachuwshuah yth shalowsh pasha al Azzah aw yth arba ahy lah shuwb cuwr Avan sham al cham bow cuwr galah shalam galuwth cagar cham cagar Adam
6.english: Thus saith The LORD; for three Transgressions of Gaza, and for four, I will not turn away punishment thereof because they carried away captive the whole captivity to deliver up to them up to Edom.

7.hebrew: han ahy shalach ash al chowah al Azzah Ashar yash akal aramown sham al
7.english: But I will send a fire on the wall of Gaza which shall devour the palaces thereof

8.hebrew: aw ahy karath al yashab al Ashdowd aw Naphash ky Tamak shabat al Ashqalown aw ahy shuwb yad al Aqrown shaarayth al Palashtay yash abad amar al Adanay Yachuwshuah Philistine
8.english: And I will cut off the inhabitant from Ashdod and him that holdeth the sceptre from Ashkelon and I will turn mine hand against Eqrown the remnant of shall perish saith the Lord God.

9.hebrew: kah amar al Yachuwshuah yth shalowsh pasha Tsowm aw yth arba ahy lah shuwb cuwr Avan sham al cham cagar shalam galuwth Adam aw Zakar lah al ach barayth
9.english: Thus saith the LORD; For three Transgressions Tyrus and For four I will not turn away the punishment thereof because they delivered up the whole captivity to Edom and remembered not the brotherly covenant

10.hebrew: han ahy shalach ash al chowmah al Tsowm Ashar yash akal al aramown sham al
10.english: But I will send a fire on the wall of Tyrus which shall devour the palaces thereof

11.hebrew: kah amar al Yachuwshuah yth shalowsh al Adam aw yth arba ahy lah shuwb cuwr Avan sham al huw asah radaph Naphash ach owd charab aw asah shachath kal racham aw Naphash aph asah taraph ad aw huw shamar Naphash abrah Natsach.
11.english: pashaThus saith the Lord For three pasha of Edom and For four I will not turn away the punishment thereof because he did pursue his brother with sword and did cast off all pity and his anger did tear perpetually and he kept his wrath for ever.

12.hebrew: han ahy shalach ash al Tayman Ashar al aramown al Batsarah.
12.english: yash kal But I will send a fire upon Teman which shall devour the palaces of Bozrah.

13.hebrew: kah amar al YaChuwshuah yth pasha al ban al Amman aw yth arba ahy lah shuwb cuwr al avan Sham al Cham hayach baqa Kashashah owd harah al Galaad ky Cham taqaph Rachab Cham gabuwl
13.english: Thus saith the LORD; For three transgressions of the children of Ammon, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment thereof, because they have ripped up the women with child of Gilead, that they might enlarge their border.

14.hebrew: han ahy yatsath ash al Chowmah al Rabbath aw yash akal Aramown Sham al owd taruwah al yowm al MalChamah owd caar al yowm al cuwphah
14.english: But I will kindle a fire in the wall of Rabbah, and it shall devour the palaces thereof, with shouting in the day of battle, with tempest in the day of the whirlwind:

15.hebrew: aw Cham Malak yash halak gowlah huw aw Naphash Sar yachad amar al YaChuwshuah
15.english: And their king shall go into captivity, he and his princes together, saith the LORD.

1.hebrew: kah amar al YaChuwshuah yth shalowsh Mawab aw yth arba ahy shuwb cuwr Sham al huw Saraph atsam al Malak al adam thereof; because he burned the bones of the king of Edom
1.english: pasha al THUS saith the LORD; For three transgressions of al avan Moab, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment al Sayd into lime.

2.hebrew: han ahy shalach ash al Mawad aw yash akal Aramown al qaryowth aw Mawad yash Mawth shaphar
2.english: But I will send a fire upon Moab, and it shall devour the palaces of Kirioth: and Moab shall die owd shaown owd taruwah aw owd qowl al with tumult, with shouting, and with the sound of the trumpet:

3.hebrew: aw ahy karath al shaphat al qarab Sham al aw ahy harag kol Sar Sham al owd Naphash amar al YaChuwshuah
3.english: And I will cut off the judge from the midst thereof, and will slay all the princes thereof with him, saith the LORD.

4.hebrew: kah amar al YaChuwshuah yth shalowsh al yachadah aw yth arba ahy lah shuwb cuwr avan Sham al Cham hayach Maac Tarach al YaChuwshuah aw hayach lah Shamar Naphash Chaq aw Cham kazab Nathan Cham taah achar Asar Cham Ab hayach halak
4.english: pasha Thus saith the LORD; For three transgressions of Judah, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment thereof; because they have despised the law of the LORD, and have not kept his commandments, and their lies caused them to err, after the which their fathers have walked:

5.hebrew: han ahy shalach ash al yachadah aw Aramown al Shalam
5.english: yash akal But I will send a fire upon Judah, and it shall devour the palaces of Jerusalem.

6.hebrew: kah amar al YaChuwshuah yth shalowsh pasha Thus saith the LORD; For three transgressions al yasharaA aw yth arba ahy lah shuwb cuwr al avan Sham al Cham Makar Tsaddayq al kacaph aw abyown yth puwk al Naal
6.english: of Israel, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment thereof; because they sold the righteous for silver, and the poor for a pair of shoes;

7.hebrew: ky shaaph achar aphar al arats al Rash al abyown aw Natah darak al anayv aw Kash aw Naphash Ab ahy yalak huw Naarah chalal any qadash Sham
7.english: That pant after the dust of the earth on the head of the poor, and turn aside the way of the meek: and a man and his father will go in unto the same maid, to profane my holy name:

8.hebrew: aw Cham Natah Cham yarad al bagad Shuwm chabal darak kol Mazabaah aw Cham shathah yayn al anash al bayth al Cham AlaSham
8.english: And they lay themselves down upon clothes laid to pledge by every altar, and they drink the wine of the condemned in the house their god.

9.hebrew: owd Shamad any Amaray panym Cham gabahh hayach kamow al gabahh al araz aw huw hayach chacan allown owd any Shamad Naphash paray Maal aw Naphash sharash al Tachath
9.english: Asar Yet destroyed I the Amorite before them, whose height was like the height of the cedars, and he was strong as the oaks; yet I destroyed his fruit from above, and his roots from. beneath.

10.hebrew: gam any Alah attanah Alah al arats al Matsaraym aw yalak attanah raba shanah al Madabar yarash arats al Amaray
10.english: Also I brought you up from the land of Egypt, and led you forty years through the wilderness, to possess the land of the Amorite.

11.hebrew: aw any quwm al Naphash ban yth Naby aw al Naphash bachuwr anash yth aph zath howy attanah ban al yasharaAl amar al YaChuwshuah
11.english: And I raised up of your sons for prophets, and Nazar yash lah of your young men for Nazarites. Is it not even thus, O ye children of Israel? saith the LORD.

12.hebrew: han attanah Nathan Nazar yayn shaqah aw Tsavah Naby amar Naba lah hannah hayach uwq Tachath attanah al agalah huw uwq I am pressed under yash Mala al amyr
12.english: But ye gave the Nazarites wine to drink; and commanded the prophets, saying, prophesy not. Behold, you, as a cart is pressed that is full of sheaves.

14.hebrew: gam Manowc yash abad al qal aw al Chazaq yash lah amats Naphash koach gabbar Malat Naphash
14.english: Therefore the flight shall perish from the swift, and the lah yash strong shall not strengthen his force, neither shall the mighty deliver himself.

15.hebrew: lah yash huw amad ky taphas qashath aw huw qal al ragal yash lah Malat Naphash lah yash ky Rakab cuwc Malat Naphash
15.english: Neither shall he stand that handleth the bow; and he that is swift of the foot shall not deliver himself: neither shall he that rideth the horse deliver himself.

16.hebrew: aw huw Ammyts bayn gabbar yash Nuwc cuwr arown al ky yowm amar al YaChuwshuah away
16.english: And he that is courageous among the mighty shall flee naked in the day, saith the LORD.

1.hebrew: Shama zath dabar ky al YaChuwshuah hayach dabar al attanah howy ban al yasharaAl al kol Mashapachah Asar any Alah al arats al Matsaraym amar
1.english: Hear this word that the LORD hath spoken against you , O children of Israel, against the whole family which I brought up from the land of Egypt, saying,

2.hebrew: attanah raq hava yada al kol Mashapachah al arats kan al ahy paqad attanah kan kol Naphash avan
2.english: You only have I known of all the families of the earth: therefore I will punish you for all your iniquities

3.hebrew: yakal shanaym yalak yachad balaty Cham yaad
3.english: Can two walk together, except they be agreed?

4.hebrew: ahy aray shaag al yaar Asar huw hayach ayn taraph ahy kaphayr Nathan al Naphash Maownah han huw hayach lakad balaty
4.english: Will a lion roar in the forest, when he had no prey? Will a young lion cry out of his den, if he have taken nothing?

5.hebrew: yakal Tsappar Naphal pach al arats ayach lah Maqash yash kan Naphash yash gabar Alah pach al arats aw hayach laqach lah aw kol
5.english: Can a bird fall in a snare upon the earth, where no gin is for him? Shall one take up a snare from the earth, and have taken nothing at all?

6.hebrew: yash shaphar taqa al ayar aw am lah charad yash Sham Ra al ayar aw al YaChuwshuah hayach lah asah yash
6.english: Shall a trumpet be blown in the city, and the people not be afraid? Shall there be evil in a city, and the LORD hath not done it?

7.hebrew: ky al Adanay YaChuwshuah ahy asah lah han huw galah Naphash cowd al Naphash abad Nabay
7.english: Surely the Lord GOD will do nothing, but he revealeth his secret unto his servants the prophets.

8.hebrew: al aray hayach YaChuwshuah hayach dabar My yakal han Naba
8.english: shaag My ahy lah yara al Adanay The lion hath roared, who will not fear? the Lord God hath spoken, who can but prophesy?

9.hebrew: Shama al aramown aw Ashdowd aw al aramown al arats al Matsaraym aw amar acaph Naphash al har al Shamarwn aw raah Rab Mahuwmah qarab Sham al aw ashaq tavak Sham al
9.english: Publish in the palaces at Ashdod, and in the palaces in the land of Egypt, and say, Assemble yourselves upon the mountain of Samaria, and behold the great tumults in the midst thereof, and the oppressed in the midst thereof.

10.hebrew: kan Cham yada lah asah Nakachah Naam al YaChuwshuah My atsar Chamac aw shad al Cham LORD, aramown
10.english: For they know not to do right, saith the who store up violence and robbery in their palaces.

11.hebrew: al kan amar al Adanay YaChuwshuah Tsar Sham yash aph cabayb arats aw huw yash yarad Naphash az al attah aw Naphash aramown yash bazaz
11.english: Therefore thus said the Lord GOD; An adversary there shall be even round about the land; and he shall bring down thy strength from thee, and thy palaces shall be spoiled.

12.hebrew: kah amar al YaChuwshuah al raah Natsal al pah al aray Shanaym kara aw badal al azan kan yash ban al yasharaAl Natsal ky yashab Shamarwn al paah al Mattah aw al Dammashaq aras
12.english: Thus saith the Lord; As the shepherd taketh out of the mouth of the lion two legs, or a piece of an ear; so shall the children of Israel be taken out that dwell in Samaria in the corner of a bed, and in Damascus in a couch.

13.hebrew: Shama attanah aw uwd al bayth al yaaqab Naam al Adanay AlaSham al AlaSham
13.english: Hear ye, and testify in the house of Jacob, al Tsabaach saith the Lord GOD, the God of hosts,

14.hebrew: ky yowm ky yash paqad pasha al yasharaAl al Naphash ahy gam paqad Mazabaach al Baythal aw qaran al Mazabaach yash gada aw Naphal arats bayth aw bayth al shan yash bad aw Rab bayth yash hayach cuwph Naam YaChuwshuah
14.english: That in the day that I shall visit the transgressions of Israel upon him I will also visit the altars of Beth-el: and the horns of the altar shall be cut off, and fall to the ground. 15.aw ahy Nakah charaph bayth owd qayats And I will smite the winter house with the summer house; and the houses of ivory shall perish, and the great houses shall have an end, saith the LORD

1.hebrew: Shama zah dabar attanah parah al Bashan har al Shamarwn Asar ashaq dal Asar ratsats abyown Asar amar al Cham adown bow aw yanach anachnuw shathah
1.english: ky hy al HEAR this word ye kine of Bashan, that are in the mountain of Samaria, which oppress the poor, which crush the needy, which say to their masters, Bring, and let us drink.

2.hebrew: al Adanay YaChuwshuah qadash han yowm yash bow al attanah han huw ahy Nasa attanah Nasa owd tsannah aw Naphash acharyth owd cayr duwgah
2.english: baal shaba darak Naphash The Lord GOD hath sworn by his holiness, that, lo, the days shall come upon you, that he will take you away with hooks, and your posterity with fishhooks.

3.hebrew: aw yash yatsa aw parats Kashashah parah aw han Asar Nadan Naphash aw yash shalak Cham al harmown Naam al YaChuwshuah
3.english: And ye shall go out at the breaches, every cow at that which is before her; and ye shall cast them into the palace, saith the Lord.

4.hebrew: bow Baythal aw pasha aw galgal Rabah pasha aw bow Naphash zabach Kashashah baqar aw Naphash MaAsar al shalowsh yowm
4.english: Come to Beth-el, and transgressions; Gilgal multiply transgressions; and bring your sacrifices every morning, and your tithes after three years:

5.hebrew: aw qatar zabach al Towdah owd Chamats aw qara aw Shama habhab al kah ahab attanah howy attah ban al yasharaAl Naam al Adanay YaChuwshuah
5.english: And offer a sacrifice of thanksgiving with leaven, and proclaim and publish the free offerings: for this liketh you, O ye children of Israel, saith the Lord GOD

6.hebrew: aw any gam havah Nathan attah Naqqayon al shan kol Naphash ayr aw chacar laCham kol Naphash Maqowm owd hayach attah lah shuwb al any amar al YaChuwshuah
6.english: And I also have given you cleanness of teeth in al your cities, and want of bread in all your places: yet have ye not returned unto me, saith the LORD.

7.hebrew: aw gam any havah Mana gasham al attah Asar Sham hayach owd shalowsh chadash qatsayr aw any Nathan yash Matar al achad ayar aw Nathan yash lah Matar al achad ayar achad badal hayach Matar aw al badal Asar al Matar lah yabash
7.english: And also I have withholden the rain from you, when there were yet three months to the harvest: and I caused it to rain upon one city, and caused it not to rain upon another city: one piece was rained upon, and the piece whereupon rained not withered.

8.hebrew: kan Shanaym aw Shalowsh ayar Nuwa al achad ayar Shathah Maym han Cham hayach lah Sabaa owd hayach attah lah shuwb al any Naam al YaChuwshuah
8.english: So two or three cities wandered unto one city, to drink water; but they were not satisfied: yet have ye not returned unto me, saith the LORD.

9.hebrew: any havah Nakah attah owd Shadaphah aw yaraqown Asar Naphash gannah aw Naphash karam aw Naphash taan ats aw Naphash zayth ats Rabah gazam akal Cham owd havah attah lah shuwb al any Naam YaChuwshuah
9.english: I have smitten you with blasting and mildew: when your gardens and your vineyards and your fig trees and your olive trees increased, the palmerworm devoured them: yet have ye not returned unto me saith LORD.

10.hebrew: any havah shalach bayn attah dabar al darak al Matsaraym Naphash bachar anash havah any harag owd charab aw havah shabay Naphash cuwc aw any havah asah baash al Naphash Machanah Alah al Naphash aph owd havah attah lah shuwb al any Naam al YaChuwshuah
10.english: I have sent among you the pestilence after the manner of Egypt: your young men have I slain with the sword, and have taken away your horses; and I have made the stink of your camps to come up unto your nostrils: yet have ye not returned unto me, saith the LORD.

11.hebrew: any havah haphak allah al attah hy AlaSham Mahapakah cadam aw Amarah aw attah hayach hy uwd Natsal al Saraphah owd havah attah lah shuwb al any Naam al YaChuwshuah
11.english: I have overthrown some of you as GOD overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah, and ye were as a firebrand plucked out of the burning: yet have not returned unto me, saith the LORD

12.hebrew: al kan ahy asah al attah howy yasharaAl aw aqab ahy ashah kan al attah kuwn qarah attah AlaSham howy yasharaAl
12.english: Therefore thus will I do unto thee, O Israel: and because I will do this unto thee, prepare to meet thy God, O Israel.

13.hebrew: al han hy ky yatsar har aw bara ruwach aw Nagad al adam My hy Naphash shach ky asah shachar ayphah aw
13.english: For, lo, he that formeth the mountains, and createth the wind, and declareth unto man what is his thought, that maketh the morning darakness, and

1.hebrew: Shama attanah kah Asar any Nasa al attah aph qaynah howy bayth al yasharaAl
1.english: HEAR ye this word which I take up against you even a lamentation, O house of Israel.

2.hebrew: bathuwlah al yasharaAl hy Naphal Naphash yash lah owd quwm Naphash hy Natash adamah Sham hy any quwm Naphash quwm
2.english: The virgin of Israel is fallen; she al Naphash shall no more rise: she is forsaken upon her land; there is none to raise her up.

3.hebrew: kan amar Adanay YaChuwshuah al ayar darak alaph yash Shaar Maah aw ky Asar yatsa darak Maah yash Shaar Asar al bayth al yasharaAl
3.english: ky yatsa For thus saith the Lord GOD; The city that went out by a thousand shall leave a hundred, and that which went forth by a hundred shall leave ten, to the house of Israel.

4.hebrew: kan amar al YaChuwshuah al bayth al yasharaAl darash attah any aw attah yash Chayah
4.english: For thus saith the LORD unto the house of Israel, Seek ye me, and ye shall live:

5.hebrew: han darash lah baythal lah bow al galgal aw lah al Baar Shaba al galgal yash ky yatsa al galah aw baythal yash hayach avan
5.english: abar But seek not Beth-el, nor enter into Gilgal, and pass not to Beer-sheba: for Gilgal shall surely go into captivity, and Beth-el shall come to naught.

6.hebrew: darash al YaChuwshuah aw yash Chayah pan huw Tsalaach kamow ash al bayth al yawcaph aw akal aw Sham hava ayn kabah yash al baythal
6.english: Seek the LORD, and ye shall live: lest he break out like fire in the house of Joseph, and devour it, and there be none to quench it in Beth-el.

7.hebrew: attah My haphak Mashaphat laanah aw yabach Tsadaqah al arats
7.english: Ye who turn judgment to wormwood, and leave off righteousness in the earth.

8.hebrew: darash Naphash ky asah kaymah aw kacayl aw haphak TsalaMavath al baqar aw asah yowm Chashak owd layl ky qara al Maym al yam aw Shaphak Cham Shaphak al panym al arats al YaChuwshuah hy Naphash Sham face of the earth: The LORD is his name:
8.english: Seek him that maketh the seven stars and Orion, and turneth the shadow of death into the morning, and maketh the day dark with night: that calleth for the waters of the sea, and poureth them out upon the

9.hebrew: ky balag al shad al az kan al shad yash bow al Mabatsar
9.english: That strengtheneth the spoiled against the strong, So that the spoiled shall come against the fortress.

10.hebrew: Cham Sana Naphash ky yakach al Shaar aw Cham taab Naphash ky dabar Tamaym
10.english: They hate him that rebuketh in the gate, and they abhor him that speaketh uprightly.

11.hebrew: yaan al kan Naphash bashac hy al dal aw attah laqach al Naphash Mashath al bar attah hava banah bayth al gazayth han yash lah yashab Cham attah hava Nata Chamad karam han yash lah Shathah yayn al Cham
11.english: Forasmuch therefore as your treading is upon the poor, and ye take from him burdens of wheat: ye have built houses of hewn stone, but ye shall not dwell in them; ye have planted pleasant vineyards, but ye shall not drink wine of them.

12.hebrew: al any yada Naphash Rab pasha aw Naphash atsuwm Chattaah Cham Tsarar Tsaddayaq Cham laqach kaphar aw Cham Natah abyown al Shaar al Cham Nakachah
12.english: For I know your manifold transgressions and your mighty sins: they afflict the just, they take a bribe, and they turn aside the poor in the gate from their right.

13.hebrew: kan al Sakal yash Shamar damam ky ath
13.english: Therefore the prudent shall keep silence in that time.

14.hebrew: darash Tab aw lah Ra ky attah yakal Chayah aw kan YaChuwshuah AlaSham al Tsabaah yash owd
14.english: Seek good, and not evil, that ye may live and so the LORD, the God of hosts, shall be with attah al yash amar you, as ye have spoken.

15.hebrew: Sana Ra aw ahab Tab aw yatsag Mashaphat al Shaar yash yakal ky al YaChuwshuah AlaSham al Tsabaah ahy Chanan al Shaaryth al yacaph
15.english: Hate the evil, and love the good, and establish judgment in the gate: it may be that the LORD God of hosts will be gracious unto the remnant of Joseph.

16.hebrew: al kan YaChuwshuah AlaSham al Tsabaah Adanay amar kah Macapad yash kal Rachab aw Cham yash amar kal chuwts haw haw aw Cham yash qara akkar abal aw Asar hy yada al Nahay Macpad
16.english: Therefore the LORD, the God of hosts, the lord, saith thus; Wailing shall be in all streets; and they shall say in all the highways, Alas! alas! and they shall call the husbandman to mourning, and such as are skilful of lamentation to wailing.

17.hebrew: kal karam yash Macpad kan ahy abar qarab attah amar al YaChuwshuah
17.english: And in all vineyards shall be wailing: for I will pass through thee, saith the LORD.

18.hebrew: howy al attah ky avah yowm al YaChuwshuah hy Chashak aw lah owr
18.english: Woe unto you that desire the day of the LORD!Mah cuwph yash kan attah yowm al YaChuwshuah to what end is it for you? The day of the LORD is darkness and not light.

19.hebrew: Asar Kash asah Nuwc al aray aw dab paga Naphash aw bow al bayth aw camak Naphash yad al qayr aw NaChash Nashak Naphash
19.english: As if a man did flee from a lion, and a bear met him; or went into the house, and leaned his hand on the wall, and a serpent bit him.

20.hebrew: yash lah yowm al YaChuwshuah yash Chashak aw lah owr aph amanam aphal aw lah Nagahh al yash
20.english: Shall not the day of the LORD be darkness, and not light? Even very dark, and no brightness in it?

21.hebrew: any Sana any Maac Naphash chag yowm aw ahy lah ruwach Naphash atsarah
21.english: I hate, I despise your feast days, and I will not smell in your solemn assemblies.

22.hebrew: ky am attah Alah any wlah habhab aw Naphash akal Manachah ahy lah ratsah Cham lah ahy Nabat Shalam Manachah al Naphash Maray
22.english: Though ye offer me burnt offerings, and your meat offerings, I will not accept them: neither will I regard the peace offerings of your fat beasts

23.hebrew: cuwr attanah cuwr al any hamown al Naphash shayr kan ahy lah Shama zamarah al Naphash Nabal
23.english: Take thou away from me the noise of thy songs: for I will not hear the melody of thy viols.

24.hebrew: han yanach Mashaphat galal yarad kan Maym aw Tsadaqah kan aythan Nachal
24.english: But let judgment run down as waters, and righteousness as a mighty stream.

25.hebrew: hava attah Nagash al any zabach aw Manachah al Madabar Arbaym shanah howy bayth
25.english: Have ye offered unto me sacrifices and offerings al yasharaAl in the wilderness forty years, O house of Israel?

26.hebrew: han attanah hava Nasa al cakkuwth al Naphash Malak aw kayuwn Naphash tsalam kowkab al Naphash AlaSham Asar attah asah Naphash
26.english: But ye have borne the tabernacle of your Moloch and Chiun your images, the star of your god, which ye made to yourselves.

27.hebrew: al kan ahy dan attanah yatsa galah
27.english: Therefore will I cause you to go into captivity

1.hebrew: howy Cham Shaanan Tsayown aw batach al har al Shamarwn Asar hy Naqab Rashayth al gowy Cham al bayth al yasharaAl bow
1.english: WOE to them that are at ease in Zion, and trust in the mountain of Samaria, which are named chief of the attah ky nations, to whom the house of Israel came!

2.hebrew: abar attah al kalnah aw raah aw al Sham yalak attah Chamath al Rab az yarad Gath al Palashtay Tab Cham Tab Man allah Mamlakah aw Cham gabal Rab Man Naphash gabal
2.english: Pass ye unto Calneh, and see; and from thence go ye to Hamath the great: then go down to Gath of the Philistines: be they better than these kingdoms? or their border greater than your border?

3.hebrew: attah ky shalach Rachaq Nadah Ra yowm aw
3.english: Yet that put far away the evil day, and dan shabath al Chamac Nagash ky cause the seat of violence to come near;

4.hebrew: ky shakab al Mattah al shan aw carach Cham al Cham aras aw akal kar al tsaan aw agal al tavak al Marabaq
4.english: That lie upon beds of ivory, and stretch themselves upon their couches, and eat the lambs out of the flock, and the calves out of the midst of the stall;

5.hebrew: ky parat pah al Nabal aw Chashab Cham kalay al shayr kamow ThuwThMashash
5.english: That chant to the sound of the viol, and invent to themselves instruments of music, like David;

6.hebrew: ky shathah yayn Mazaq aw Mashach Cham owd Rashayth Shaman han hy lah chalah kan shabar Dyacaph
6.english: That drink wine in bowls, and anoint themselves with the chief ointments: but they are not grieved for the affliction of Joseph.

7.hebrew: al kan attah yash Cham yarad galah owd Rash ky yarad galah aw Marazach al Cham ky carach Cham yash cuwr
7.english: Therefore now shall they go captive with the first that go captive, and the banquet of them that stretched themselves shall be removed.

8.hebrew: Adanay YaChwshuah ahyach shaba Naphash Naam al YaCuwshuah AlaSham al Tsabaah any Taab gaown al yaaqab aw Sana Naphash Aramown kan ahy cagar ayr owd Mala
8.english: The Lord GOD hath sworn by himself, saith the LORD the God of host, I abhor the excellency of Jacob, and hate his palaces: therefore will I deliver up the city with all that is therein.

9.hebrew: aw yash hayach abar am Sham al achad bayth ky Cham yash Mawth
9.english: yathar Asar anash And it shall come to pass, if there remain ten men in one house, that they shall die.

10.hebrew: aw adam dwd yash Nasa Naphash Nasa aw huw ky caraph Naphash yatsa atsam al bayth aw yash amar al Naphash ky huw arach yarakah al bayth huw Sham owd kol owd attah aw huw yash amar aphac az yash huw amar hacah al any yakol Nathan zakar al Sham al YaChuwshuah
10.english: And a man's uncle shall take him up, and he that burneth him, to bring out the bones out of the house, and shall say unto that is by the sides of the house is there yet any with thee? and he shall say, No. Then shall he say, hold thy tongue: for we may not make mention of the LORD.

11.hebrew: al han al YaChuwshuah Tsavah aw huw ahy Nakah gadal bayth owd racyc aw qatan bayth owd baqaya
11.english: For, behold, the LORD commandeth and he will smite the great house with breaches, and the little house with clefts.

12.hebrew: yash cuwc ruwts al cala ahy achad charash Sham owd baqar al attah hayach haphak Mashaphat al Rash aw paray al Tsadaqah al laanah
12.english: Shall horses run upon the rock? will one plow there with oxen? for ye have turned judgment into gall, and the fruit of righteousness into hemlock:

13.hebrew: attah Asar Shamach dabar lah Asar amar hava any lah laqach anachnuw qaran ratsan Chazaq
13.english: Ye which rejoice in a thing of naught, which say, darak anaky have we not taken to us horns by our own strength?

14.hebrew: han ahy quwm al atanah gay howy bayth al yasharaAl Naam al YaChuwshuah al AlaSham al Tsabach aw Cham yash lachats
14.english: But, behold I will raise up against you a nation, O house of Israel saith the LORD the attanah God of hosts; and they shall afflict you

1.hebrew: koh hayach Adanay YaChuwshuah raah al any aw hannah hy yatsar gowb Tachallah al Alah al laqash aw hannah yash laqash achar al Malak gaz
1.english: Thus hath the Lord GOD shewed unto me; and, behold, he formed grasshoppers in the beginning of the shooting up of the latter growth and lo, it was the latter growth after the king's mowings.

2.hebrew: aw yash hayach ky am Cham Chaza asah kalah al akal asab arats az ahy amar howy Adanay YaChuwshuah calach Na arach May yash yaaqab GOD quwm al huw qatan
2.english: And it came to pass that when they had made an end of eating the grass of the land, then I said, O Lord forgive, I beseech thee: by whom shall Jacob arise? for he is small.

3.english: Nacham al zath yash lah amar The LORD repented for this: It shall not be, saith the LORD.

4.hebrew: koh hayach Adanay YaChuwshuah raah al any aw hannah Adanay YaChuwshuah aw akal Rab Tachowm aw asah akal chalaq
4.english: Thus hath the Lord GOD shewed unto me: qara ryb ash aw and, behold, the Lord GOD called to contend by fire and it devoured the great deep, and did eat up a part

5.hebrew: az amar ahy howy Adanay YaChuwshuah chadayThen Na arach May yash yaaqab quwm al huw qatan
5.english: said I, O Lord GOD, cease, I beseech thee: by whom shall Jacob arise? For he is small.

6.hebrew: al YaChuwshuah NaCham al zath huw lah yash amar Adanay YaChuwshuah
6.english: gam yash The LORD repented for this: This also shall , not be, saith the Lord GOD.

7.hebrew: Kah huw raah aw hannah Adanay Natsab al Chowmah asah anak ad anak al Naphash yad
7.english: Thus he shewed me: and, behold, the Lord stood upon a wall made by a plumbline, with a plumbline in his hand.

8.hebrew: aw YaChuwshuah aw ahy amar anak az amar YaChuwshuah ahy Shuwm anak qarach al any am yasharaAl ahy lah yacaph abar Cham kal owd
8.english: amar al any Amac Mah raah And the LORD said unto me, Amos, what seest thou? hannah And I said, A plumbline. Then said the Lord, behold, I will set a plumbline in the midst of my people Israel: I will not again pass by them any more:

9.hebrew: al bamah Maqowm al yashachaq yash Shamam aw Maqadash al yasharaAl yash Shuwm charab aw ahy quwm al bayth al yaraboam ad charab
9.english: And the high places of Isaac shall be desolate, and the sanctuaries of Israel shall be laid waste: and I will rise against the house of Jeroboam with the sword.

10.hebrew: az yarabaam qashar al attanah qarach al bayth al yasharaAl arats huw lah yakal kuwl
10.english: yachashahAmats al kahan al Baythal shalachThen Amaziah the priest of Beth-el sent to Malach al yasharaAl amar Amac hayach Jeroboam king of Israel, saying, Amos hath conspired against thee in the midst of the house of Naphash dabar Israel: the land is not able to bear all his words.

11.hebrew: kah Amac amar yarabaam yash Muwth aw yasharaAl yash kay yalak Nadah galah al Cham ratsan adamah
11.english: charab For thus Amos saith, Jeroboam shall die by the sword and Israel shall surely be led away captive out of their own land.

12.hebrew: gam yachashahAmats amar al Amac howy charah yalak barach attanah yalak al arats al yachadah aw Sham akal lacham aw Naba Sham
12.english: Also Amaziah said unto Amos, O thou seer, go, flee thee away into the land of Judah, and there eat bread, and prophesy there:

13.hebrew: han Naba lah yacaph kal owd baad baythal kah bayth
13.english: But prophesy not again any more at Beth-el: yash Malach Maqadash aw yash al Mamalakah for it is the king's chapel, and it is the king's court.

14.hebrew: az lah Nabay lah yash Nabay ban han yash baqar aw balac al Shaqam paray
14.english: anah Amac aw amar yachashahAmats yash Then answered Amos, and said to Amaziah, I was no prophet, neither was I a prophet's son; but I was a herdman and a gatherer of sycamore fruit:

15.hebrew: aw al YaChuwshuah Tsan aw YaChuwshuah amar al any yalak Naba al any am yasharaAl
15.english: laqach yash yalak achar And the LORD took me as I followed the flock, and the LORD said unto me, Go, prophesy unto my people Israel.

16.hebrew: attah kan Shama dabar al YaChuwshuah amar Naba lah al yasharaAl aw Nataph lah dabar al bayth la yashachaq
16.english: Now therefore hear thou the word of the LORD: Thou sayest, Prophesy not against Israel, and drop not thy word against the house of Isaac.

17.hebrew: kan kah amar YaChuwshuah yash zanah al ayar aw yash ban aw yash ban yash Naphal darak charab aw yash adamah yash chalaq chabal aw yash Muwth
17.english: attah Kashashah Therefore thus saith the LORD; Thy wife shall be a harlot in the city, and thy sons and thy daughters shall fall by the sword, and thy land hall be divided by line; and thou shalt die

1.hebrew: koh hayach Adanay YaChuwshuah hannah kalab qayts paray
1.english: raah al any aw Thus hath the Lord GOD shewed unto me: and Behold a basket of summer fruit.

2.hebrew: aw hy amar Amac Mah raah aw any amar kalaq qayts az amarYaChuwshuah al any qats bow al any am al yasharaAl ahy lah yacaph abar Cham kal owd
2.english: And he said, Amos, what seest thou? And I said, A basket of summer fruit. Then said the LORD unto me, The end is come upon my people of Israel; I will not again pass by them any more.

3.hebrew: aw shayr al haykal yash yalal ky yowm amar Adanay YaChuwshuah Sham yash Rab pagar kal Maqowm Cham yash shalak Cham yatsa hacah
3.english: And the songs of the temple shall be howlings in that day, saith the Lord GOD: there shall be many dead bodies in every place; they shall cast them forth with silence.

4.hebrew: Shama zath howy yash ky shaaph abyown aph Nathan anav any al arats shabath
4.english: Hear this, O ye that swallow up the needy, even to make the poor of the land to fail,

5.hebrew: amar Mathay Chadash abar ky yakal shabar aw shabbath ky yakal pathach bar karath ayphah tsuwq aw al gadal aw avath Mazan Maramah
5.english: Saying, When will the new moon be gone, that we may sell corn? And the sabbath, that we may set forth wheat, making the ephah small, and the great, and falsifying the balances by deceit?

6.hebrew: ky yakal qanah dal kacaph aw abyown puwk Naal gam aw shabar Mappal bar
6.english: That we may buy the poor for silver, and the needy for a pair of shoes; yea, and sell the refuse of the wheat?

7.hebrew: al YaChuwshuah hayach Shaba qaown al yaaqab ky ahy Natsach am Shakach kal al Cham Maasah
7.english: The LORD hath sworn by the excellency of Jacob, Surely I will never forget any of their works works.

8.hebrew: yash lah arats ragaz zath aw kal achad abal ky yashab Mala aw yash Alah kal hy owr aw yash garash aw shaqah hy darak yaor al Matsaraym
8.english: Shall not the land tremble for this, and every one mourn that dwelleth therein? And it shall rise up wholly as a flood; and it shall be cast out and drowned, as by the flood of Egypt.

9.hebrew: aw yash hayach abar ky yowm amar Adanay YaChuwshuah ky ahy dan Shamash bow yarad GOD, baad tsahar aw ahy Chashak arats owr yowm
9.english: And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the Lord that I will cause the sun to go down at noon, and I will darken the earth in the clear day:

10.hebrew: aw ahy haphak Naphash chag abal aw kal Naphash shayr al qaynah aw ahy Alah Saq al kal Mathan aw qarachah al kal Rash aw ahy Shuwm hy abal al yachayd ban aw acharayth Sham al hy Mar yowm
10.english: And I will turn your feasts into mourning, and all your songs into lamentation; and I will bring up sackcloth upon all lions, and baldness upon every head and I will make it as the mourning of an only son, and the end thereof as a bitter day.

11.hebrew: hannah yowm bow amar Adanay YaChuwshuah ky ahy shalach raab arats lah raab laCham aw Tsama kal Maym han al Shama dabar al YaChuwshuah
11.english: Behold, the days come, saith the Lord GOD, that I will send a famine in the land, not a famine of bread, nor a thirst for water, but of hearing the words of the LORD:

12.hebrew: aw Cham yash Nuwa yam al yam aw al Tsaphan aph Mazarach Cham yash shuwt baqash dabar al YaChuwshuah han yash lah Matsa
12.english: And they shall wonder from sea to sea, and from the north even to the east, they shall run to and fro to seek the word of the LORD but shall not find it.

13.hebrew: al ky yowm yash yaphah bathuwlah aw bachuwr anash alaph kal Tsama
13.english: In that day shall the fair virgins and young men faint for thirst.

14.hebrew: Cham ky shaba aShmah Shamarown aw amar Naphash AlaSham howy dan Chay aw darak al
14.english: They that swear by the sin of Samaria, and say, Thy God, O Dan, liveth; and, The manner of

1.hebrew: raah Adanay Natsab al Mazabaach aw huw Nakah kaphatar al pathach ky caph yakal raash aw aw batsa Cham batsa Rash kal Cham aw acharyth Cham owd charab hy ky Nuwc al Cham yash lah Nuwc Nadah aw hy ky palayt al Cham yash lah Malat
1.english: amar I SAW the Lord standing upon the altar: and he said, Smite the lintel of the door, that the posts may shake ahy harag and cut them in the head, all of them; and I will slay the last of them with the sword: he that fleeth of them shall not flee away, and he that escapeth of them shall not be delivered

2.hebrew: ky am Cham chathar Shaal Sham yash any yad laqach Cham ky am Cham Alah Shamaym Sham ahy yarad Cham yarad
2.english: Though they dig into hell, thence shall mine hand take them; though they climb up to heaven, thence will I bring them dowm:

3.hebrew: aw ky Cham chaba Cham Rash karamal ahy chaphas aw laqach Cham al Sham aw Cham Chaba al ayn qaraqa al yam Sham ahy Tsavah NaChash aw hy yash Nashak Cham
3.english: And though they hide themselves in the top of Carmel ky am I will search and take them out thence; and though they be hid from my sight in the bottom of the sea, thence will I command the serpent, and he shall bit them:

4.hebrew: aw ky am Cham yalak Shabay panaym Cham ayab Sham ahy Tsavah charab aw yash harag Cham aw ahy Shuwm any ayn al Cham al slay Ra aw lah al Towb
4.english: And though they go into captivity before their, enemies, thence will I command the sword, and it shall them: and I will set mine eyes upon them for evil, and not for good.

5.hebrew: aw Adanay YaChuwshuah Tsabaah yash ky Naga arats aw yash Muwg aw kal ky yashab Mala yash abal aw yash Alah kal kamw yaor awyash Shaqah darak yaor al Matsaraym
5.english: And the Lord GOD of hosts is he that toucheth the land, and it shall melt, and all that dwell therein shall mourn: and it shall rise up wholly like a flood; and shall be drowned, as by the flood of Egypt

6.hebrew: yash aw baal yacad Naphash agaddah arats hy qara al Maym al yam aw Shaphak Cham al al panaym al arats al YaChuwshuah hy Naphash Sham
6.english: hy ky banah Naphash Maalah Shamaym It is he that buildeth his stories in heaven, and hath founded his troop in the earth ; he that calleth for the waters of the sea, and poureth them out upon the face of the earth: The LORDis his name.

7.hebrew: hy attah lah ban al Kashy al any howy ban al yasharaAl amar al YaChuwshuah hava lah anaky Alah yasharaAl arats al Matsaraym aw Phalashatay al kaphatar aw Aram al qayr
7.english: Are ye not as children of the Ethiopians unto me, O children of Israel? saith the LORD. Have not I brought up Israel out of the land of Egypt? and the Philistines from Caphtor, and the Syrians from Kir?

8.hebrew: hannah ayn al Adanay YaChuwshuah hy al Chataah Mamlakah aw ahy Shamad al panaym Adamah aphac ky ahy lah kalayl Shamad al bayth al yaaqab amar al YaChuwshuah
8.english: Behold, the eyes of the Lord GOD are upon the sinful kingdom, and I will destroy it from off the face of the earth ; saving that I will not utterly destroy the house of Jacob, saith the LORD.

9.hebrew: al hannah ahy Tsavah aw ahy Nuwa Baythal yasharaAl bayn kal gowy kamw Shabar hy Nuwa kabarah owd
9.english: For, lo, I will command, and I will sift the house of Israel among all nations, like as corn is sifted in yash lah Tsaayr Tsarar Naphal arats a sieve, yet shall not the least grain fall upon the earth

10.hebrew: kal Chatta al any am yash Muwth darak charab Asar amar Ra yash lah Nagash aw qadam anachnuw
10.english: All the sinners of my people shall die by the sword, which say, The evil shall not overtake nor prevent us.

11.hebrew: yowm ky yowm ahy quwm cukkah al ThuwThMashash hy Naphal aw gabar parats Sham al aw ahy quwm Naphash harayacah aw ahy banah yash yowm owlah
11.english: In that day will I raise up the tabernacle of David that is fallen, and close up the breaches thereof; and I will raise up his ruins, and I will build it as in the days of old:

12.hebrew: ky Cham yakal yarash Shaarayth al Adam aw kal gowy Asar hy qara any Sham amar YaChuwshuah ky asah zath
12.english: That they may possess the remnant of Edom, and of all the heathen, which are called by my name, saith the LORD that doeth this.

13.hebrew: hannah yowm bow amar YaChuwshuah ky
13.english: Behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that the
